title: Optimization +
description: Optimization + is a lightweight Fabric modpack that achieves maximum FPS using top-tier performance mods while adding beautiful visuals like Fresh Animations and critical Quality-of-Life features.
body:
🚀 Welcome to Optimization +: Maximum FPS, Zero Compromise
Optimization + is the ultimate Fabric modpack engineered for speed and stability. Tired of lag spikes and low frame rates? This pack strips away bottlenecks and adds the best optimization mods available, ensuring you get the highest possible FPS on any machine.

Unlike simple optimization packs, Optimization + also includes support for advanced cosmetic features, letting you enjoy a highly optimized game with the beautiful visual details you crave.
